title: sesleriella sphaerocephala
intro: Sesleriella sphaerocephala, also known as the globetop or globetop sesleriella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sesleriella sphaerocephala include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other topical applications.
